race_meta.race_name: Black Pug Open National Hunt Flat Race (Category 1 Elimination) (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked merry away at position 5 with only 7.0% probability. Top pick was Presley (36.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Presley > Jetaway Holiday, but actual result was Merry Away > Presley. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Merry Away had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -3.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
